Home > Coding Assistant > Pieces

Pieces

★★★★☆ 100 times per month Paid from: $12/month

Visit official site →

An AI-powered code snippet management and productivity tool designed for developers.

Pieces Free Credits Details

  • Amount: 100 times per month
  • Reset: Resets monthly
  • Watermark: 无
  • Commercial: Yes

Pieces Key Features

  • AI-powered code snippet capture and context understanding
  • Direct capture from various development environments
  • Powerful global search and smart recommendations
  • Cross-platform support (Desktop, Mobile, Browser Extension)
  • Team collaboration and knowledge base sharing

Pros

  • Significantly boosts code reuse and lookup efficiency
  • Intuitive interface, integrates seamlessly into dev workflow
  • Free tier is sufficient for daily use

Cons

  • Advanced AI features and team collaboration require a paid subscription
  • Support for non-code note types is relatively basic

Tips

  • Fully utilize the AI context understanding feature for smarter snippet management
  • Use the browser extension to quickly save valuable code snippets from web pages
